返回一个整数数组 `ans`，其中 `ans[i]` 等于子数组 `nums[li...ri]` 中出现 **至少** `thresholdi` 次的元素，选择频率 **最高** 的元素（如果频率相同则选择 **最小** 的元素），如果不存在这样的元素则返回 -1。

 

**示例 1:**

**输入：** nums = [1,1,2,2,1,1], queries = [[0,5,4],[0,3,3],[2,3,2]]

**输出：** [1,-1,2]

**解释：**

| 查询      | 子数组             | 阈值 | 频率表       | 答案 |
| :-------- | :----------------- | :--- | :----------- | :--- |
| [0, 5, 4] | [1, 1, 2, 2, 1, 1] | 4    | 1 → 4, 2 → 2 | 1    |
| [0, 3, 3] | [1, 1, 2, 2]       | 3    | 1 → 2, 2 → 2 | -1   |
| [2, 3, 2] | [2, 2]             | 2    | 2 → 2        | 2    |

 

**示例 2:**

**输入：**nums = [3,2,3,2,3,2,3], queries = [[0,6,4],[1,5,2],[2,4,1],[3,3,1]]

**输出：**[3,2,3,2]

**解释：**

| 查询      | 子数组                | 阈值 | 频率表       | 答案 |
| :-------- | :-------------------- | :--- | :----------- | :--- |
| [0, 6, 4] | [3, 2, 3, 2, 3, 2, 3] | 4    | 3 → 4, 2 → 3 | 3    |
| [1, 5, 2] | [2, 3, 2, 3, 2]       | 2    | 2 → 3, 3 → 2 | 2    |
| [2, 4, 1] | [3, 2, 3]             | 1    | 3 → 2, 2 → 1 | 3    |
| [3, 3, 1] | [2]                   | 1    | 2 → 1        | 2    |

 

**提示：**

- `1 <= nums.length == n <= 104`
- `1 <= nums[i] <= 109`
- `1 <= queries.length <= 5 * 104`

#include <vector>
#include <unordered_map>

using namespace std;

vector<long long> solve(vector<long long> nums, vector<vector<long long>> queries) {
    vector<long long> ans;
    for (auto& q : queries) {
        long long l = q[0], r = q[1], T = q[2];
        unordered_map<long long, int> freq;
        int max_freq = 0;
        long long best = -1;
        for (long long i = l; i <= r; ++i) {
            long long num = nums[i];
            freq[num]++;
            if (freq[num] > max_freq) {
                max_freq = freq[num];
                best = num;
            } else if (freq[num] == max_freq) {
                if (num < best) {
                    best = num;
                }
            }
        }
        if (max_freq >= T) {
            ans.push_back(best);
        } else {
            ans.push_back(-1);
        }
    }
    return ans;
}
